Color Palette Generator Generate harmonious color schemes from any base color. Color harmony explained | two colors opposite each other on the color wheel. High contrast, bold pairings. | three colors adjacent on the wheel. Cohesive and natural-looking. | three colors evenly spaced (120° apart). Vibrant and balanced. | four colors forming a rectangle on the wheel. Rich and complex. Frequently asked questions How are the colors generated? Colors are derived by rotating the hue of your base color at specific angles in HSL color space, keeping saturation and lightness consistent. Can I copy individual colors? Yes | click any color swatch to copy its HEX value to your clipboard.

### Tint & Shade Scale Generator
URL: https://pixgarage.com/tools/tint-shade-generator

Generate a full 10-step tint and shade scale from any base color | similar to Tailwind's color palette. Click any swatch to copy its HEX value instantly. Tint & Shade Generator Generate a full color scale from any base color. What are tints and shades? is a color mixed with white | it increases lightness. A Frequently asked questions How is the scale generated? The lightness of your base color is distributed across 10 steps from near-white (50) to near-black (950), keeping the same hue and saturation throughout. Can I use this with Tailwind CSS? Yes | the 50–950 naming matches Tailwind's convention. Copy the HEX values and paste them into your tailwind.config

### Color Blindness Simulator
URL: https://pixgarage.com/tools/color-blindness-simulator

Preview how any color looks to people with deuteranopia, protanopia, tritanopia, and achromatopsia. Free accessibility tool, runs entirely in your browser. Color Blindness Simulator See how your colors look to people with color vision deficiencies. Types of color blindness | red-green color blindness (green deficiency). The most common type, affecting ~6% of males. | red-green color blindness (red deficiency). Affects ~2% of males. | blue-yellow color blindness. Rare, affects less than 0.01% of people. | complete color blindness, sees only in shades of grey. Very rare. Frequently asked questions Why does this matter for design? About 8% of men and 0.5% of women have some form of color vision deficiency. If your UI relies on color alone to convey meaning, these users may miss important information. How accurate is the simulation? The simulation uses established color transformation matrices (Brettel/Viénot model) and is a close approximation, but individual experiences vary.

### CSS Box & Text Shadow Generator
URL: https://pixgarage.com/tools/shadow-generator

Build box-shadow and text-shadow CSS rules visually with live preview. Adjust offset, blur, spread, and color, then copy the ready-to-use CSS property. CSS Shadow Generator Build box-shadow and text-shadow visually and copy the CSS. Box shadow vs text shadow | applies a shadow to the outside (or inside with ) of an element's box. Used for cards, buttons, and modals. | applies a shadow directly to text characters. Used for headings and decorative typography. Frequently asked questions What does spread radius do? Spread expands or contracts the shadow before blur is applied. A positive value makes the shadow larger than the element; a negative value makes it smaller. Only available on box-shadow. Can I add multiple shadows? Yes | CSS allows comma-separated shadow layers. Click Add layer to stack multiple shadows for depth effects.

### Random Color Generator
URL: https://pixgarage.com/tools/random-color-generator

Generate random colors and lock the ones you like to build a palette. Copy HEX, RGB, or HSL values with one click. Shuffle as many times as you want. Random Color Generator Generate random colors, lock favorites, and build a palette. (or press Space) to randomize all unlocked swatches. Click the lock icon on any swatch to keep that color while regenerating the rest. Click a swatch to copy its value in your preferred format. Frequently asked questions Are the colors truly random? Colors are generated using across the full HSL range, which produces vivid and varied results. The hue is fully random; saturation and lightness are constrained to avoid muddy or near-invisible colors. Can I change the number of swatches? Yes | use the + and − buttons to add or remove swatches from your palette.

## About

- [Privacy Policy](https://pixgarage.com/privacy): No data is ever uploaded or stored.
- [Contact](https://pixgarage.com/contact)
